message:
feat(resolv): add DNS evidence metrics for timeout/fallback/parse failures (bd-1y7)

Add structured metrics tracking for UDP DNS stub resolver:
- DnsMetrics struct with atomic counters for query outcomes
- Counters: attempted, success, timeout, send_error, parse_error, nxdomain, dns_error
- dns_metrics_snapshot() API for evidence collection
- Record metrics at each decision point in udp_dns_query

Tests:
- dns_metrics_snapshot_returns_valid_counters
- dns_metrics_counters_increment_on_hosts_miss

The core DNS resolver (UDP A/AAAA queries, resolv.conf parsing, timeout/retry
policy) was already implemented. This adds the evidence logging contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
